text: How can I define step defination inside a class by inheriting base setup

author: kunchamlokesh
text:
Hi,

I had requirement where I need to inherit the basesetup for tests by using a class with unittest framework

But in stepdefination when I tried create a class and call tests with [@Scenario](https://github.com/Scenario) tag by making scenarios as methods in the class an error got trigger as self is not a fixture

Request to help me to declare @scenraios inside a class by inheriting another class
